calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-02-2014 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-03-2014 Continued To Jun-18-14 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Mar-24-2014 Sustained
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances:
Grayson W. Marshall, III, Esq., Deputy Attorney General, Tel. 415.703.1604, for defendant and moving party;
Greg Lubisch II, plaintiff appearing telephonically on his own behalf.

RULING: The matter was not argued. Therefore, there being no opposition filed, DEFENDANT CALIFORNIA DEPARTMENT OF JUSTICE'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is sustained. (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) Judge: Richard A. Kramer; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Reporter: Sherry Sawyer CSR# 5976.

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Mar-14-2014 Continued To Mar-24-14 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance.

RULING: The Court vacated its tentative ruling and continued DEFENDANT CALIFORNIA DEPARTMENT OF JUSTICE's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT to March 24, 2014 at 9:30 am in Dept. 302. (The Court wants to give the plaintiff an opportunity to appear at the hearing. Clerk notified the moving party of the new hearing date by e-mail.) Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Reporter: Maria Viscio, CSR# 12353.
